title: orthosia retinaculata
intro: Orthosia retinaculata, also known as wintergreen, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high concentration of methyl salicylate, which is similar to aspirin and provides anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of wintergreen include reducing muscle and joint pain, as well as alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Wintergreen is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be applied directly to the skin or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
